usage: reinforce_pg [-help] [-area {x1, y1, x2, y2}] [-area_blockage {{x1 y1 x2 y2} {x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4 ...} ...}] [-pattern_file <file_name>] [-snap_wire_center_to_grid {default Grid}] { -pattern_map <irdrop_value pattern_name> | -write_pattern_template <file_name> | -boxes_file <file_name> | -auto_ir_fix {preroute postroute} } [ [-tile_row_column {x y} | -tile_size {x y} | -number_region <integer>] | -write_pattern_template <file_name> ] [ -rail_analysis_directory {directory} | -write_pattern_template <file_name> ]

options.name: -area_blockage
options.description: {{x1 y1 x2 y2} {x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 x4 y4 ...} ...} Specify one or multiple rectangular/rectilinear area blockages

options.name: -auto_ir_fix
options.description: Specifies to fix irdrop with auto flow.

options.name: -number_region
options.description: Number of regions for Voltus power analysis

options.name: -pattern_map
options.description: <irdrop_value pattern_name> Specify the pattern for irdrop fixing through irdrop_value and pattern_name defined at pattern_file

options.name: -rail_analysis_directory
options.description: reinforce_pg will read the rail analysis data under the directory

options.name: -snap_wire_center_to_grid
options.description: {default Grid} Specifies snap wire center to routing grid

options.name: -tile_row_column
options.description: Specify the tile number for power analysis in the x and y direction

options.name: -tile_size
options.description: Specify the tile size for power analysis in the x and y direction

options.name: -write_pattern_template
options.description: Output a template of the pattern file.
